summary.config: confirmed-IR (=gt_ir) -> JoI -> verifier(L1/L2) -> self-correct/reject; single clean config, no generated-IR mixing. RUN-TIME grades (d886015), no re-grading with current code.
summary.headline: silent-wrong deployed: OFF 35/382 (9.2%) -> ON 0/382 (0.0%). Deployed-correct 347->356 (+9). Of the 35 silent-wrong OFF candidates: 11 repaired, 24 rejected (fail-closed); cost 2 correct candidates over-rejected.

detail.name: C03_24
detail.command: If all temperature sensors in sector 1 read 35 degrees or higher, set all air conditioners in sector 1 to cool mode.

detail.name: C09_16
detail.command: Set the study air purifier to high and turn it off after 2 hours.

detail.name: C09_3
detail.command: Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours.

detail.name: C11_2
detail.command: Check the living room temperature now and again in 1 hour. If it dropped by at least 2 degrees, turn on the living room heater plug.

detail.name: C11_3
detail.command: Check the bedroom temperature now and again in 30 minutes. If it dropped by at least 3 degrees, turn on the bedroom heater plug.

detail.name: C11_6
detail.command: Check the living room illuminance now and again in 1 hour. If it dropped by at least 200 lux, turn on the living room mood-light plug.

detail.name: C12_12
detail.command: When smoke is detected in the living room, sound all fire alarms. Then, every 10 seconds, speak "Please evacuate" through the speaker.

detail.name: C14_3
detail.command: Each time button 4 of the multi-button is pressed, cycle the living room light brightness through 25→50→75 (repeating).

detail.name: C14_6
detail.command: Whenever button 4 of the multi-button is pressed, decrease the living room light brightness by 15, down to a minimum of 10.

detail.name: C16_3
detail.command: Every 30 minutes from 7 PM to 10 PM, check the robot vacuum cleaner and start it in auto mode if it is stopped.

detail.name: C16_5
detail.command: Every 7 PM, if no one is detected on the 1st floor, turn off all lights on floor 1; then 1 hour later, if no one is detected on the 2nd floor, turn off all lights on floor 2.

detail.name: C17_9
detail.command: Check all door locks in Sector 1 every hour; if any one is open, change all lights in that sector to red.

detail.name: C18_10
detail.command: At midnight, close the door and check the light every hour until 6 AM; if the brightness is greater than 30, lower it to 10.

detail.name: C20_12
detail.command: If the study door stays closed for at least 3 minutes, turn off the study light.

detail.name: C20_14
detail.command: If no one is present in the office for at least 10 minutes, turn off the office air conditioner.

detail.name: C20_4
detail.command: If the printer plug power consumption stays below 5W for at least 10 minutes, turn off the printer plug.

detail.name: C20_8
detail.command: If no motion is detected in the office for at least 5 minutes, turn off the office light.

detail.name: C23_1
detail.command: If no motion is detected in the living room for at least 10 minutes, dim the living room light to 30%, then turn it off 5 minutes later.

detail.name: C23_2
detail.command: If the porch door stays open for at least 1 minute, turn on the porch light, then turn it off 3 minutes later.

detail.name: C23_3
detail.command: If no one is present in the study for at least 15 minutes, dim the study light to 20%, then turn it off 10 minutes later.

detail.name: C23_4
detail.command: If the bedroom temperature stays above 28 degrees for at least 5 minutes, turn on the fan, then turn it off 20 minutes later.

detail.name: C24_1
detail.command: If the entrance door stays open for at least 1 minute, announce 'Please close the door' through the speaker every 30 seconds, up to 3 times.

detail.name: C24_2
detail.command: If a person stays in the meeting room for at least 2 minutes, announce 'The meeting starts soon' through the speaker every 1 minute, 3 times.

detail.name: C24_3
detail.command: If the office plug power stays below 5W for at least 10 minutes, announce 'Device is idle' through the speaker every 2 minutes, 3 times.

detail.name: C24_4
detail.command: If no one is present in the lobby for at least 1 minute, announce 'Is anyone there' through the speaker every 15 seconds, up to 4 times.

detail.name: C24_5
detail.command: If the safe door stays closed for at least 30 seconds, capture an image with the camera every 30 seconds, up to 5 times.

rows.name: C02_23
rows.command: Set all air conditioners in the office to cool mode.

rows.command: Close all blinds in the living room.

rows.name: C02_28
rows.command: Set all air purifiers in the warehouse to high mode.

rows.command: Set all robot vacuum cleaners with even tags to auto mode.

rows.name: C03_10
rows.command: If the charger is fully charged, turn off the charger.

rows.name: C03_11
rows.command: If the button is in the pushed state, raise the blind.

rows.name: C03_12
rows.command: If the speaker volume is 40 or higher, stop the playback.

rows.name: C03_13
rows.command: If face recognition at the entrance is off, start it.

rows.name: C03_14
rows.command: If the shade is 30% or less open, set it to 50%.

rows.name: C03_15
rows.command: If the sound sensor level in livingroom is over 50, stop the speaker.

rows.name: C03_16
rows.command: If the air conditioner in livingroom is in cool mode, switch it to auto mode.

rows.name: C03_17
rows.command: If any presence sensor in the house is currently in the detected state, set the siren to emergency mode.

rows.name: C03_18
rows.command: If the contact sensor at the entrance is in detected state, sound the emergency siren.

rows.name: C03_19
rows.command: If it is raining, set all dehumidifiers in the house to drying mode.

rows.name: C03_2
rows.command: If the cloud service is activated, upload test.png file to the cloud.

rows.name: C03_20
rows.command: If the temperature in sector 1 is 36.5 degrees or higher, set the target temperature to 30.

rows.name: C03_21
rows.command: If the carbon dioxide concentration in the farm is 800ppm or higher, sound the emergency siren.

rows.command: If the temperature on the airquality sensor is below 20 degrees, close the door.

rows.name: C03_23
rows.command: If the temperature in the bedroom is 36.5 degrees or higher, set the bedroom air conditioner to 30 degrees.

rows.name: C03_24
rows.command: If all temperature sensors in sector 1 read 35 degrees or higher, set all air conditioners in sector 1 to cool mode.

rows.command: If the sector 1 temperature is 30 degrees or higher, set the sector 1 air conditioner target temperature to 22 degrees.

rows.name: C03_26
rows.command: If the living room illuminance is below 50 lux, turn on the living room light.

rows.name: C03_27
rows.command: If no one is present in the office, turn off the office air conditioner.

rows.command: If any door lock in sector 1 is open, sound the sector 1 siren in police mode.

rows.command: If any indoor Group1 humidity sensor reads 60% or higher, set all indoor Group1 dehumidifiers to drying mode.

rows.command: If the living room temperature is at least 26C, turn on the living room AC plug; otherwise turn it off.

rows.name: C03_5

rows.name: C03_6

rows.command: If the speaker is playing, stop it.

rows.name: C05_1
rows.command: If someone is in the living room and smoke is being detected in the kitchen, announce 'Smoke has been detected in the kitchen' through the living room speaker and close the kitchen valve.

rows.name: C05_10
rows.command: If the weather is rainy and no one is being detected, lock the door and close the valve.

rows.name: C05_11
rows.command: If the oven is heating and no one is being detected, change the oven mode to warming and notify that the oven mode has been changed to warming.

rows.name: C05_12
rows.command: If the noise level is 80 or higher and no person is being detected, stop speaker playbackand sound the emergency siren.

rows.name: C05_13
rows.command: If the carbon dioxide is 1500ppm or higher and the blind is closed, set the air purifier to auto and raise the blind.

rows.name: C05_14
rows.command: If the temperature is 18 degrees or below and someone is detected, set the air conditioner to heat mode and 22 degrees.

rows.name: C05_15
rows.command: If it is raining and the door is open, close the door and set the dehumidifier to internal Care mode.

rows.name: C05_16
rows.command: If a person is detected and smoke is detected, sound the siren in fire mode and announce "Evacuate" through the speaker.

rows.name: C05_17
rows.command: If the pressure is 100 or higher and no one is home, close the valve and sound emergency siren.

rows.name: C05_18
rows.command: If no motion is detected but the door is open, take a photo and output "Warning" through the speaker.

rows.name: C05_19
rows.command: If the study carbon dioxide is 1000ppm or higher and the air purifier is in sleep mode, switch to auto mode and say "Switching the air purifier to auto mode" through the speaker.

rows.name: C05_2
rows.command: If the bedroom temperature is 26 degrees or higher and the bedroom window is open, close the window and turn on the air conditioner.

rows.name: C05_20
rows.command: If the bathroom humidity is 85% or higher and the bathroom door is closed, turn on the light and open the door.

rows.name: C05_21
rows.command: If the face ID 'family' is recognized at the entrance and the door lock is locked , unlock the door lock and open the door.

rows.name: C05_22
rows.command: If the garden illuminance is below 50 and the terrace light is off, turn on the light and play an announcement in the garden.

rows.name: C05_23
rows.command: If it is raining and the living room window is open, close the window and set the dehumidifier to dehumidifying mode.

rows.name: C05_24
rows.command: If the baby room sound is 50dB or higher and the living room speaker is stopped, say the baby is awake through the speaker and play "lullaby.mp3" file.

rows.name: C05_25
rows.command: If the server room temperature is 30 degrees or higher and the AC is off, turn it on and sound the main emergency siren.

rows.name: C05_26
rows.command: If the wine cellar temperature is 15 degrees or higher and humidity is 60% or higher, turn on the air conditioner and turn off the humidifier.

rows.name: C05_27
rows.command: If a water leak is detected in the basement and the main valve is open, close all main valves and sound the police siren.

rows.name: C05_28
rows.command: If the warehouse fine dust level is 100 or higher and the air purifier is in auto mode, switch it to high mode and say through the warehouse speaker "Switching to high mode".

rows.name: C05_29
rows.command: If the motion is detected in the guest room and the air conditioner is off, set the air conditioner to auto mode and set the target temperature to 24.

rows.name: C05_3
rows.command: If motion is detected in the garage and the main siren is off, sound the siren in emergency and take a picture.

rows.name: C05_30
rows.command: If the living room light is on and the illuminance is 50 lux or higher, close the living room blind and set the AC to auto mode.

rows.name: C05_4
rows.command: If the temperature is 28 degrees or higher and the humidity is 70% or higher, set the air conditioner to cool mode and 24 degrees.

rows.name: C05_5
rows.command: If the carbon dioxide concentration is 1200ppm or higher and person is being detected, set the air purifier to high mode and announce a warning using the speaker.

rows.name: C05_6
rows.command: If it is raining and the humidity is 80% or higher, set the dehumidifier to drying mode and output "It's raining and himidity is high" through the speaker.

rows.name: C05_7
rows.command: If the noise level is 70 or higher and no one is home, take a photo with the camera and sound the police siren.

rows.name: C05_8
rows.command: If the illuminance is 100 lux or lower and a person is being detected, set the speaker volume to 30 and play relax.mp3 music.

rows.name: C05_9
rows.command: If the fine dust level is 150 or higher and the door is open, close the door and set the air purifier to high.

rows.name: C06_1

rows.name: C06_2

rows.name: C06_3

rows.name: C06_4

rows.command: When button 3 of the multi-button is pressed, turn on all lights on floor 1.

rows.name: C08_8
rows.command: When button 4 of the multi-button is pressed, turn off all lights on floor 1.

rows.name: C08_9
rows.command: When button 1 of the multi-button is pressed, turn on the entrance light and turn it off after 5 minutes.

rows.name: C09_1
rows.command: Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour.

rows.name: C09_10
rows.command: Start the dehumidifier in drying mode and change to refreshing mode after 1 hour.

rows.name: C09_11
rows.command: Open all valves in the kitchen and close them again after 5 minutes.

rows.name: C09_12
rows.command: Close all blinds in the bedroom and open them again after 2 hours.

rows.name: C09_13
rows.command: Turn on all dehumidifiers in the lab and turn them off after 4 hours.

rows.name: C09_14
rows.command: Lock all warehouse door locks and sound the emergency siren 1 minute later.

rows.name: C09_15
rows.command: Turn on the kitchen light and turn on the kitchen dehumidifier 10 seconds later.

rows.name: C09_16
rows.command: Set the study air purifier to high and turn it off after 2 hours.

rows.name: C09_17
rows.command: Turn off the bathroom light and turn on after 5 minutes.

rows.name: C09_18
rows.command: Close the meeting room door. After 3 seconds take a picture with the meeting room camera.

rows.name: C09_2
rows.command: Set the air conditioner to cool mode and switch to auto mode after 30 minutes.

rows.name: C09_3
rows.command: Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours.

rows.name: C09_4
rows.command: Set the air conditioner temperature to 24 degrees and change it to 26 degrees after 1 hour.

rows.name: C09_5
rows.command: Set the oven mode to Bake and change it to warming mode after 10 minutes.

rows.name: C09_6
rows.command: If the dust level concentration is 2000ppm or above, close the door and close the valve after 4 hours.

rows.name: C09_7
rows.command: Sound the siren in emergency mode and change it to fire mode after 5 seconds.

rows.name: C09_8
rows.command: Start the robot vacuum cleaner in auto mode and switch to manual mode after 30 minutes.

rows.name: C09_9
rows.command: Set the speaker volume to 20 and increase it to 40 after 10 minutes.

rows.name: C10_1
rows.command: When the presence sensor detects someone, take a picture after 1 minute.

rows.name: C10_2
rows.command: When the oven enters heating mode, switch it to microwave mode after 3 seconds.

rows.name: C10_3
rows.command: When the humidity falls below 30%, output "Humidity is low" through the speaker after 3 seconds.

rows.name: C10_4
rows.command: When it rains, close the door and check again after 1 hour; if it's not raining then, open the door again.

rows.name: C10_5
rows.command: When any presence sensor in the house detects presence, sound all emergency sirens after 10 seconds.

rows.name: C10_6
rows.command: When any light in the hallway is turned on, turn off all lights in the living room after 5 minutes.

rows.name: C10_7
rows.command: When any air purifier in the office switches to sleep mode, turn off the light after 10 minutes.

rows.name: C10_8
rows.command: When any illuminance sensor on the terrace reaches 100 lux or higher, raise all blinds after 5 seconds.

rows.name: C10_9
rows.command: When any temperature sensor in the data center reaches 30 degrees or higher, set all air conditioners to cool mode after 1 minute.

rows.name: C11_1
rows.command: Check the wine cellar temperature now and again in 10 minutes. If it has changed by 1 degree or higher, announce through the speaker that the wine cellar temperature has changed rapidly.

rows.name: C11_2
rows.command: Check the living room temperature now and again in 1 hour. If it dropped by at least 2 degrees, turn on the living room heater plug.

rows.name: C11_3
rows.command: Check the bedroom temperature now and again in 30 minutes. If it dropped by at least 3 degrees, turn on the bedroom heater plug.

rows.name: C11_4
rows.command: Check the living room humidity now and again in 20 minutes. If it dropped by at least 10%, turn on the living room humidifier plug.

rows.name: C11_5
rows.command: Check the kitchen temperature now and again in 15 minutes. If it changed by at least 5 degrees, turn on the kitchen ventilation fan plug.

rows.name: C11_6
rows.command: Check the living room illuminance now and again in 1 hour. If it dropped by at least 200 lux, turn on the living room mood-light plug.

rows.name: C11_7
rows.command: Check the bedroom humidity now and again in 30 minutes. If it rose by at least 15, turn on the bedroom dehumidifier plug.

rows.name: C11_8
rows.command: Check the wine cellar temperature now and again in 1 hour. If it rose by at least 2 degrees, announce through the living room speaker.

rows.name: C12_1
rows.command: When the door opens, make the speaker speak "Welcome" every minute thereafter.

rows.name: C12_10
rows.command: When the server rack humidity becomes higher than 70%, set the lab dehumidifier to dehumidifying mode and check the humidity every hour; turn it off if it's below 50%.

rows.name: C12_11
rows.command: When the carbon dioxide level in the parking lot exceeds 880 ppm, speak "CO2 level danger" through the parking lot speaker every 10 seconds thereafter.

rows.name: C12_12
rows.command: When smoke is detected in the living room, sound all fire alarms. Then, every 10 seconds, speak "Please evacuate" through the speaker.

rows.name: C12_13
rows.command: When any presence sensor on the 1st floor detects presence, sound all emergency sirens for 3 seconds every minute thereafter and then turn them off.

rows.name: C12_14
rows.command: When motion is detected in the lobby, capture an image of the lobby every 30 seconds thereafter.

rows.name: C12_15
rows.command: When smoke is detected by the kitchen smoke detector, speak "Fire outbreak" through the living room speaker every 10 seconds thereafter.

rows.name: C12_2
rows.command: When the contact sensor is closed, sound the police siren every 10 seconds thereafter.

rows.name: C12_3
rows.command: Once the entrance door is opened, check the safe every 5 minutes thereafter and announce "The safe is open" through the speaker if it's not locked.

rows.name: C12_4
rows.command: When a leak is detected, close the valve immediately and then speak "Leak detected. Please evacuate." through the speaker every minute thereafter.

rows.name: C12_5
rows.command: When smoke is detected, sound the emergency siren for 5 seconds every minute thereafter.

rows.name: C12_6
rows.command: When the charger voltage drops to 4V or lower, speak "The charging voltage is low" through the speaker every 30 minutes thereafter.

rows.name: C12_7
rows.command: When smoke is detected, announce it through the speaker and then send an email every 5 minutes thereafter to "test@example.com" with the subject "Fire Warning" and the content "A fire has occurred. Please evacuate.".

rows.name: C12_8
rows.command: When the spin speed becomes 0, say 'Please take out the laundry' through the speaker every 10 minutes thereafter.

rows.name: C12_9
rows.command: When motion is detected, capture an image every 10 seconds thereafter.

rows.name: C13_1
rows.command: Every hour, repeat opening and closing the door.

rows.name: C13_2
rows.command: Every 30 minutes, toggle the living room air purifier between sleep mode and auto mode.

rows.name: C13_3
rows.command: Repeat opening and closing the window every 10 minutes.

rows.name: C13_4
rows.command: Every 30 minutes, toggle the air purifier between sleep mode and high speed mode.

rows.name: C13_5
rows.command: Repeat opening and closing the living room blind every hour.

rows.name: C13_6
rows.command: Repeat opening and closing the bedroom window every 2 hours.

rows.name: C13_7
rows.command: Every hour, alternate the air conditioner's target temperature between 25 and 20 degrees.

rows.name: C14_1
rows.command: Each time button 1 of the multi-button is pressed, increase the hallway light brightness by 10, up to a maximum of 100.

rows.name: C14_2
rows.command: Each time button 2 of the multi-button is pressed, decrease the hallway light brightness by 10, down to a minimum of 0.

rows.name: C14_3
rows.command: Each time button 4 of the multi-button is pressed, cycle the living room light brightness through 25→50→75 (repeating).

rows.name: C14_4
rows.command: Whenever motion is detected, increase the light brightness by 10. If it reaches max, stop it.

rows.name: C14_5
rows.command: Whenever button 3 of the multi-button is pressed, increase the bedroom light brightness by 5, up to a maximum of 80.

rows.name: C14_6
rows.command: Whenever button 4 of the multi-button is pressed, decrease the living room light brightness by 15, down to a minimum of 10.

rows.name: C14_7
rows.command: Whenever motion is detected, increase the kitchen light brightness by 20, up to a maximum of 100.

rows.name: C15_1
rows.command: At 6 PM, set the level of all blinds with odd tags on the wall to 50%.

rows.name: C15_10
rows.command: At 6 PM every day, announce the dinner menu of the student cafeteria through the speaker.

rows.name: C15_11
rows.command: When the Christmas arrives, change the light color to red.

rows.name: C15_12
rows.command: Every hour on Christmas, play 'Christmas.mp3' through the speaker.

rows.name: C15_13
rows.command: Every 11 PM, close all doors with even tags.

rows.name: C15_14
rows.command: Every morning at 7 AM, open all blinds in Zone 1.

rows.name: C15_15
rows.command: Every 8 AM, open all blinds with odd tags, then 1 hour later open all blinds with even tags.

rows.name: C15_16
rows.command: At 9 AM, open all blinds with even tags on the 3rd floor.

rows.name: C15_17
rows.command: Turn on the light every morning at 8 AM.

rows.name: C15_18
rows.command: At 8 AM, turn on the high-efficiency tagged air purifier and set it to auto mode.

rows.name: C15_19
rows.command: At 1 PM, open all blinds.

rows.name: C15_2
rows.command: Every 2 hours on weekends, set all robot vacuum cleaners in the living room to repeat mode.

rows.name: C15_20
rows.command: Every day at midnight, capture an image with all cameras in the parking lot.

rows.name: C15_21
rows.command: Every day at 11 PM, turn off all floor 1 lights with odd tags.

rows.name: C15_3
rows.command: Lock the doorlock every day at midnight.

rows.name: C15_4
rows.command: Set the rice cooker to reheating mode every morning at 7 AM.

rows.name: C15_5
rows.command: On weekdays from 8 AM to midnight every hour, capture an image with the camera.

rows.name: C15_6
rows.command: When the new year begins, make the arm robot say hello.

rows.name: C15_7
rows.command: On weekdays at 7 AM, start the rice cooker in auto-cleaning mode.

rows.name: C15_8
rows.command: At 6 AM on Mondays and Wednesdays, announce the weather information through the speaker.

rows.name: C15_9
rows.command: At noon every day, announce the lunch menu of the 301 building cafeteria through the speaker.

rows.name: C16_1
rows.command: On weekends at 3 PM, check for leakage; if detected, set the siren to emergency mode.

rows.name: C16_10
rows.command: Every morning at 8 AM, make the speaker speak 'Get up'. Additionally, if the window is closed, open it.

rows.name: C16_11
rows.command: Check every 5 minutes from 10 PM to 11 PM and turn it off when charging is complete.

rows.name: C16_12
rows.command: At 6 PM, if any window is open, close all of them.

rows.name: C16_13
rows.command: Every 10 PM, if the meeting room door lock is open, lock it and turn off the meeting room light.

rows.name: C16_2
rows.command: Every Monday at 8 AM, if both the safe and the door lock are locked, say 'It is safe' through the speaker

rows.name: C16_3
rows.command: Every 30 minutes from 7 PM to 10 PM, check the robot vacuum cleaner and start it in auto mode if it is stopped.

rows.name: C16_4
rows.command: At 11 PM, if safe is open or the door lock is open , speak 'Check the safe and door lock' through the speaker.

rows.name: C16_5
rows.command: Every 7 PM, if no one is detected on the 1st floor, turn off all lights on floor 1; then 1 hour later, if no one is detected on the 2nd floor, turn off all lights on floor 2.

rows.name: C16_6
rows.command: At 6 PM on weekdays, if presence sensors in the office show no presence, turn off all air conditioners and humidifiers in the office.

rows.name: C16_7
rows.command: Every 10 PM, if presence is detected in the living room, turn on all lights.

rows.name: C16_8
rows.command: At midnight, if motion is detected in the hallway, turn all hallway lights to 100% brightness.

rows.name: C16_9
rows.command: Every hour from midnight to 5 AM, if at least one door is open, turn all hallway lights to 50%.

rows.name: C17_1
rows.command: Every 10 minutes, if the temperature is 30 degrees or higher, set the air conditioner to cool mode.

rows.name: C17_10
rows.command: Measure the temperature every 15 minutes; turn on the air conditioner in cool mode if it's 25 degrees or higher, and turn it off if it's below 25 degrees.

rows.name: C17_11
rows.command: Whenever the car charger in the parking lot is fully charged, speak "Charging is complete" through the speaker.

rows.name: C17_12
rows.command: Every 30 minutes, if any hallway light brightness is 50% or higher, turn off all hallway lights.

rows.name: C17_2
rows.command: Every 30 minutes, if the temperature is 20 degrees or higher and below 30 degrees, set the air conditioner to auto mode; if it is 30 degrees or higher, set it to cool mode.

rows.name: C17_3
rows.command: Every hour, increase the speaker volume by 10.

rows.name: C17_4
rows.command: Check every 30 minutes; if the temperature is 30 degrees or higher, set the target temperature to 25 degrees; if it's below 23 degrees, set it to 26 degrees.

rows.name: C17_5
rows.command: Check humidity every 10 minutes; if it's 50 or higher, turn off the humidifier; if it's 20 or lower, turn on the humidifier and set it to auto mode.

rows.name: C17_6
rows.command: Check the fine dust level every hour; if it's 200 or higher, set the air purifier to high speed; if it's 100 or lower, set it to low speed.

rows.name: C17_7
rows.command: Check every 5 minutes; if the charger is fully charged, turn it off.

rows.name: C17_8
rows.command: Every minute, if the humidity of all sensors in Group2 is 50% or higher, set all dehumidifiers to refresh mode.

rows.name: C17_9
rows.command: Check all door locks in Sector 1 every hour; if any one is open, change all lights in that sector to red.
rows.off_msg: l2 exception: ValueError: expression not allowed as statement: DeviceRef(key='doorlock.doorlockstate')

rows.name: C18_1
rows.command: Every 5 minutes from 1 PM to 3 PM, repeat opening and closing the valve.

rows.name: C18_10
rows.command: At midnight, close the door and check the light every hour until 6 AM; if the brightness is greater than 30, lower it to 10.
rows.off_msg: l2 exception: ValueError: expression not allowed as statement: Lit(value=True)

rows.name: C18_2
rows.command: Every 30 minutes on weekend afternoons, set the robot vacuum cleaner to auto mode.

rows.name: C18_3
rows.command: From 10 PM to midnight every 10 minutes, sound the emergency siren.

rows.name: C18_4
rows.command: Every 10 minutes from now until 3 PM, sound the emergency siren for 5 seconds and then turn it off.

rows.name: C18_5
rows.command: Every 30 minutes during weekends, check all pumps in the factory; if any one is turned on, turn off all pumps and send an email to "test@example.com" with the subject 'Risk' and message 'A pump is turned on'.

rows.name: C18_6
rows.command: If no motion is detected between 10 PM and 11 PM, lock all door locks.

rows.name: C18_7
rows.command: Every 30 seconds from 10 PM to 11 PM, check for rain; if it rains, close the window.

rows.name: C18_8
rows.command: Every 5 seconds on weekends, if the pump is off, turn it on; if it is on, turn it off.

rows.name: C18_9
rows.command: Every hour from 6 PM to 8 PM, if someone is detected on the 1st floor, turn on all 1st floor lights.

rows.name: C19_1
rows.command: Every 1 second, if the living room temperature is at least 28C, turn on the AC plug; otherwise if it is 25C or below, turn off the AC plug.

rows.name: C19_2
rows.command: Every 1 second, if the living room humidity is at least 70%, turn on the dehumidifier plug; otherwise if it is 50% or below, turn off the dehumidifier plug.

rows.name: C19_3
rows.command: Every 1 second, if the living room illuminance is at most 200 lux, turn on the floor lamp plug; otherwise if it is at least 500 lux, turn off the floor lamp plug.

rows.name: C19_4
rows.command: Every 1 second, if the living room temperature is at most 18C, turn on the heater plug; otherwise if it is at least 22C, turn off the heater plug.

rows.name: C19_5
rows.command: Every 1 second, if the living room humidity is at most 30%, turn on the humidifier plug; otherwise if it is at least 55%, turn off the humidifier plug.

rows.name: C19_6
rows.command: Every 1 second, if the bedroom temperature is at least 26C, turn on the bedroom fan plug; otherwise if it is 23C or below, turn off the bedroom fan plug.

rows.name: C19_7
rows.command: Every 1 second, if the kitchen temperature is at least 32C, turn on the kitchen ventilation fan plug; otherwise if it is 28C or below, turn off the kitchen ventilation fan plug.

rows.name: C19_8
rows.command: Every 1 second, if the bathroom humidity is at least 75%, turn on the bathroom ventilation fan plug; otherwise if it is 55% or below, turn off the bathroom ventilation fan plug.

rows.name: C20_1
rows.command: If no motion is detected in the living room for at least 30 seconds, turn off the living room power strip plug.

rows.name: C20_10
rows.command: If the garage door stays open for at least 30 seconds, turn on the garage light.

rows.name: C20_11
rows.command: If the TV plug power stays below 10W for at least 15 minutes, turn off the TV plug.

rows.name: C20_12
rows.command: If the study door stays closed for at least 3 minutes, turn off the study light.

rows.name: C20_13
rows.command: If no motion is detected in the bathroom for at least 20 seconds, turn off the bathroom fan.

rows.name: C20_14
rows.command: If no one is present in the office for at least 10 minutes, turn off the office air conditioner.

rows.name: C20_15
rows.command: If the pantry door stays open for at least 45 seconds, turn on the pantry light.

rows.name: C20_16
rows.command: If the charger plug power stays below 5W for at least 30 minutes, turn off the charger plug.

rows.name: C20_17
rows.command: If motion is detected in the backyard for at least 1 minute, turn on the backyard light.

rows.name: C20_2
rows.command: If the front door stays open for at least 5 seconds, turn on the ventilation fan plug.

rows.name: C20_3
rows.command: If a person is detected in the living room for at least 30 seconds, turn on the living room TV plug.

rows.name: C20_4
rows.command: If the printer plug power consumption stays below 5W for at least 10 minutes, turn off the printer plug.

rows.name: C20_5
rows.command: If the front door stays closed for at least 1 minute, turn on the living room air conditioner plug.

rows.name: C20_6
rows.command: If no motion is detected in the bedroom for at least 1 minute, turn off the bedroom floor lamp plug.

rows.name: C20_7
rows.command: If the kitchen door stays open for at least 10 minutes, turn on the kitchen ventilation fan plug.

rows.name: C20_8
rows.command: If no motion is detected in the office for at least 5 minutes, turn off the office light.

rows.name: C20_9
rows.command: If a person stays in the meeting room for at least 2 minutes, turn on the projector.

rows.name: C21_1
rows.command: If no person is detected in either the living room or the bedroom, turn off the living room power strip plug.

rows.name: C21_2
rows.command: If both the front door and the balcony door are closed, turn on the living room security camera plug.

rows.name: C21_3
rows.command: If motion is detected in either the living room or the bedroom, announce through the living room speaker.

rows.name: C21_4
rows.command: If both the living room and bedroom illuminance are at most 100 lux, turn on the living room mood-light plug.

rows.name: C21_5
rows.command: If both the living room and bedroom temperatures are at least 25C, turn on the living room fan plug.

rows.name: C21_6
rows.command: If both the living room and the kitchen illuminance are at most 50 lux, turn on the living room mood-light plug.

rows.name: C21_7
rows.command: If either the living room or the bedroom temperature is at least 30C, turn on the living room AC plug.

rows.name: C22_1
rows.command: Every 5 minutes, capture an image with the meeting room camera. Stop after 10 photos.

rows.name: C22_10
rows.command: Every 20 seconds, turn the kitchen light on. Stop after 8 runs.

rows.name: C22_2
rows.command: Every 30 seconds, turn on the living room light. Repeat 4 times and stop.

rows.name: C22_3
rows.command: Every 1 minute, announce "lunch time" through the speaker. Total 3 times.

rows.name: C22_4
rows.command: Every 2 minutes, turn on the heater plug. Stop after 6 runs.

rows.name: C22_5
rows.command: Every 20 minutes, announce "meeting reminder" through the speaker. Total 5 times.

rows.name: C22_6
rows.command: Every 10 seconds, sound the siren in emergency mode. Stop after 6 bursts.

rows.name: C22_7
rows.command: Every 1 hour, open the bedroom blind. Total 5 times.

rows.name: C22_8
rows.command: Every 15 minutes, set the air purifier to high mode. Stop after 4 runs.

rows.name: C22_9
rows.command: Every 3 minutes, open the garage door. Repeat 3 times.

rows.name: C23_1
rows.command: If no motion is detected in the living room for at least 10 minutes, dim the living room light to 30%, then turn it off 5 minutes later.

rows.name: C23_2
rows.command: If the porch door stays open for at least 1 minute, turn on the porch light, then turn it off 3 minutes later.

rows.name: C23_3
rows.command: If no one is present in the study for at least 15 minutes, dim the study light to 20%, then turn it off 10 minutes later.

rows.name: C23_4
rows.command: If the bedroom temperature stays above 28 degrees for at least 5 minutes, turn on the fan, then turn it off 20 minutes later.

rows.name: C23_5
rows.command: If no motion is detected in the hallway for at least 3 minutes, dim the hallway light to 50%, then turn it off 2 minutes later.

rows.name: C24_1
rows.command: If the entrance door stays open for at least 1 minute, announce 'Please close the door' through the speaker every 30 seconds, up to 3 times.

rows.name: C24_2
rows.command: If a person stays in the meeting room for at least 2 minutes, announce 'The meeting starts soon' through the speaker every 1 minute, 3 times.

rows.name: C24_3
rows.command: If the office plug power stays below 5W for at least 10 minutes, announce 'Device is idle' through the speaker every 2 minutes, 3 times.

rows.name: C24_4
rows.command: If no one is present in the lobby for at least 1 minute, announce 'Is anyone there' through the speaker every 15 seconds, up to 4 times.

rows.name: C24_5
rows.command: If the safe door stays closed for at least 30 seconds, capture an image with the camera every 30 seconds, up to 5 times.

rows.name: C25_1
rows.command: Every 5 minutes, check the living room temperature; if it is 28 degrees or higher set the air conditioner to cool, otherwise auto. Stop after 6 times.

rows.name: C25_2
rows.command: Every 10 minutes, check the bedroom temperature; if it is below 20 degrees set the air conditioner to heat, otherwise auto. Stop after 4 times.

rows.name: C25_3
rows.command: Every 1 minute, check the server room temperature; if it is 30 degrees or higher set the air conditioner to cool, otherwise auto. Stop after 10 times.

rows.name: C25_4
rows.command: Every 30 minutes, check the office temperature; if it is 26 degrees or higher set the air conditioner to cool, otherwise auto. Stop after 5 times.

rows.name: C25_5
rows.command: Every 15 minutes, check the living room temperature; if it is below 18 degrees set the air conditioner to heat, otherwise auto. Stop after 3 times.
